# retrieve-specifications
Description: Retrieve a set of generated specifications and receive their file paths.
Source: project
1. Signal your readiness to receive the generated specifications.
2. The system will then retrieve the specified documents.
3. The system will save these documents to a designated directory.
4. The system will provide you with the file paths for the saved documents.
